About Me

I am a passionate DevOps Engineer with experience in AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines and Linux troubleshooting.

Skills

  • AWS & Cloud Architecture
  • Docker & Kubernetes
  • CI/CD (GitHub Actions, Jenkins)
  • Linux & Shell Scripting
  • Python Basics

Projects

DevOps Nginx Deployment - Dockerized Nginx application deployed using CI/CD pipeline.

Kubernetes Microservices - Managed 20+ microservices with proper namespace and labeling strategy.
